primary_reasons: The mechanism is somewhat novel but relies on existing concepts of orthogonal matrices.
The idea may not be significantly different from low-rank factorization techniques.
Implementation details are somewhat vague and could benefit from more specificity.
revision_instructions: To enhance novelty, consider introducing a new mathematical transformation or a unique way to combine the skew-symmetric matrix with other components. Additionally, clarify the implementation steps to ensure they are unambiguous and provide more specific metrics for expected performance improvements. Finally, ensure that the proposed method is distinctly different from existing low-rank techniques.
